name: Lycheetah Framework
author: Mackenzie Conor James Clark
description: Nine mathematical frameworks describing how reality organizes itself. Knowledge reorganization, ethical invariants, consciousness dynamics, transformation calculus. Validated, audited, open.
tagline: We didn't invent these patterns. We formalized what reality already does.

use_cases: Build ethical AI systems with constitutional constraints
Organize contradictory knowledge without information loss
Measure system coherence and predict reorganization points
Generate curricula adapted to learner state
Detect approaching crises via Lyapunov stability analysis

what_you_get: CASCADE engine — truth pressure computation and knowledge reorganization
AURA constraints — seven invariants that make any system stable
MICROORCIM tracker — sovereignty measurement at the edge of chaos
HARMONIA calculator — consonance and Kuramoto synchronization
TRIAD tracker — gradient ascent with convergence guarantee
Master equation calibrator — fit coupling constants from your own data
Constitutional guardrails — PROTECTOR, HEALER, BEACON axioms enforced

constitutional_guarantee.axiom_1: PROTECTOR — Ground truth > fantasy. No harm, ever.
constitutional_guarantee.axiom_2: HEALER — Clarity without bypass. Transformation without denial.
